transcript: AI: Aaj ghar me hi bahar nahi gaye? [Why are you at home today, didn't you go out?] Human: It is raining heavily outside. AI: "It is raining heavily" ko sahi English me "It is raining cats and dogs" bol sakte ho. [You can say "It is raining cats and dogs" in correct English instead of "It is raining heavily".] Human: Oh okay, aur jab barish dheere ho rahi ho to? [Oh okay, and when it's raining slowly?] AI: Toh usko bolenge "It is drizzling outside." [Then we will say "It is drizzling outside."] Human: Oh... accha, actually mujhe English acche se nahi aati. [Oh... I see, actually I don't know English very well.] AI: Koi problem nahi, AI teachers try kiya? [No problem, did you try AI teachers?] Human: Par wo toh mehnge hote honge na? [But they must be expensive, right?] AI: Bilkul nahi! Normal English classes se 7 guna sasta hai, isliye 1 crore se zyada log MySivi par English practice kar rahe hain. [Not at all! It is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes, that's why more than 1 crore people are practicing English on MySivi.] Human: Par time nahi milta. [But I don't get time.] AI: Roz ki sirf 15-20 minute ki practice kaafi hai. Bilkul confident ho jaoge. [Just 15-20 minutes of daily practice is enough. You will become completely confident.] Human: Wow, phir kaise join karu? [Wow, then how do I join?] AI: Ye Install ka button dabao aur MySivi app install karo. Sign up karo aur practice start karo. Sirf 15 dino mein tumhe improvement dikhne lagegi. Chalo shuru ho jao! [Press this Install button and install the MySivi app. Sign up and start practicing. You will start seeing improvement in just 15 days. Come on, get started!] Voiceover: Install now pe click karo aur MySivi app download karo. [Click on Install now and download the MySivi app.]

[are doing.] Par time nahi [But no time] Roz ki sirf 15-20 minute ki practice [Daily only 15-20 minutes practice] Bilkul confident [Completely confident] Wow, Phir kaise join [Wow, then how to join] Ye Install ka [This Install] MySivi AI English Spe... summary: An AI robot avatar corrects a young man's English phrasing during a rainy day conversation. The AI then introduces the MySivi app as an affordable, time-efficient way to practice English daily. The ad ends with a call to action to install the app for quick improvement.
